scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace web run typecheck && npm --workspace admin run typecheck
scripts.build: npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace web run build && npm --workspace admin run build
